_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the per-section src/ files; CI regenerates this file.

rows.When to use: Element has no visible text (icon buttons, close buttons)
A visible element labels another (modal heading → dialog)
Additional context beyond the label (helper text, error messages)
Dynamic regions updating without page reload (toasts, alerts, live search)
Decorative icons or repeated visual elements
Active item in navigation, breadcrumbs, tabs
Triggers for dropdowns, accordions, collapsible panels
Any interactive element that should remain discoverable but not actionable — inputs, links, tabs, menu items, checkboxes, custom components

items: Labels describe purpose, not appearance — "Submit" not "Blue button".
The accessible name must contain the visible text of the element (the 1:1 rule).
Grouped inputs (date range, phone + country) have a group label annotated separately.
First rule of ARIA: if a native HTML element exists (<button>, <nav>), use it instead of an ARIA role.
